title: Workhorse Group (WKHS) Stock Analysis and Financial Overview
text: Workhorse Group Inc. is a commercial EV manufacturer specializing in medium-duty electric trucks for last-mile delivery and fleet operations. The company's product portfolio includes the W4 CC Class 4 cab chassis trucks and W56 step vans designed for commercial delivery applications. Workhorse operates through dealer partnerships and direct sales channels, with presence across North America. Key initiatives include the Stables by Workhorse program demonstrating real-world EV performance, strategic partnerships with major fleet operators like FedEx, and expansion into government procurement through GSA contracts. The company's financial challenges include ongoing losses and cash burn, partially offset by growing order pipeline and commercial momentum. Recent merger with Motiv Electric Trucks aims to address operational and financial constraints through consolidation.
